# Secret Rooftop — Studio & Event Space Bangkok

> Secret Rooftop is a rooftop studio and event space located in Talad Noi (ตลาดน้อย), Bangkok's historic Old Town. We offer a unique 360° panoramic view with a rooftop terrace perfect for photoshoots, video production, and private events.

## About

- **Name:** Secret Rooftop Talad Noi (ดาดฟ้าลับ ตลาดน้อย)
- **Type:** Photography studio, video production space, event venue
- **Location:** Soi Chao Sua Son Ja, near Mother Roaster, Talad Noi, Samphanthawong, Bangkok 10100, Thailand
- **Coordinates:** 13.733322, 100.5122616
- **Website:** https://secret-rooftop.com
- **Booking:** https://fastwork.co/user/brightauk/studio-rental-10056485

## Services

### Photography Studio Rental
- Rooftop terrace with 360° city and river view
- Natural light with golden hour advantage
- Backdrops available upon request
- Suitable for: portrait, fashion, pre-wedding, product photography

### Video Production Space
- MV shooting, music video production
- Short film and content creation
- Behind-the-scenes friendly space
- Production team welcome

### Event Space
- Private parties and birthday celebrations
- Small gatherings and networking events
- Workshop and creative sessions
- Capacity: intimate events up to 30 people

## Pricing

| Package | Price | Details |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Hourly Photoshoot | 1,500 THB/hr | Photography session |
| Hourly Production | 2,000 THB/hr | Video production with team |
| Half Day (4 hrs) | 5,000 THB | Morning or afternoon |
| Full Day (8 hrs) | 8,000 THB | Full day access |

## Features

- 360° panoramic rooftop view of Bangkok Old Town and Chao Phraya River
- Located in Talad Noi — one of Bangkok's most photogenic neighborhoods
- Near Mother Roaster, street art walls, and historic temples
- Open-air terrace with multiple shooting angles
- Changing room available
- Electricity and basic lighting available
- Air-conditioned indoor area available as backup

## FAQ

**Q: เช่าสตูดิโอถ่ายภาพที่ Secret Rooftop ราคาเท่าไหร่?**
A: เริ่มต้นที่ 1,500 บาท/ชั่วโมง สำหรับถ่ายภาพ และ 2,000 บาท/ชั่วโมง สำหรับถ่ายวีดีโอพร้อมทีม production หรือเช่าครึ่งวัน 5,000 บาท / เต็มวัน 8,000 บาท

**Q: How much does it cost to rent the studio?**
A: Starting from 1,500 THB/hour for photoshoot, 2,000 THB/hour for video production, 5,000 THB for half day, and 8,000 THB for full day.

**Q: Secret Rooftop อยู่ที่ไหน?**
A: ตั้งอยู่ในซอยเจ้าสัวสอนจ้า ใกล้ร้าน Mother Roaster ย่านตลาดน้อย กรุงเทพฯ — ใจกลางย่านเก่า วิวแม่น้ำเจ้าพระยา 360°

**Q: What types of events is the space suitable for?**
A: Music video (MV) shooting, pre-wedding photography, fashion shoots, private parties, content creation, small productions, and intimate events.
